scripts.kill: powershell -Command "$p = (netstat -ano | Select-String ':5000.*LISTENING' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1); if ($p) { taskkill /PID $p /F } else { Write-Host 'Port 5000 is free' }"
scripts.build: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
